# CodeBakers Configuration
# Auto-generated template - customize for your project

## Mode

**Current Mode:** beginner

**Options:**
- `beginner` — Simplified interface, auto-applies all patterns, hides complexity
- `standard` — Shows pattern warnings, atomic unit checklist, basic diagnostics
- `expert` — Full control, pattern overrides, custom domains, all diagnostics

**Auto-Promotion:**
- Beginner → Standard: After 3 successful builds
- Standard → Expert: User opt-in only

## Build Statistics

**Builds Completed:** 0
**Last Build:** Never
**Auto-Promote At:** 3 builds

## Preferences

**Auto-Apply Patterns:** true (beginner/standard), false (expert)
**Show Diagnostics:** false (beginner), basic (standard), full (expert)
**Interactive Tutorial:** shown_once (set to false to show again)
